global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with promotional text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 offer with free delivery.

elements.label: Solid yellow background
elements.description: A bright yellow background fills the entire banner, providing a vibrant and eye-catching base.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'CraveLoop' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the banner.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: The text reads '2-for-1 tonight' in a large, bold font, centrally placed to attract attention.

elements.label: Delivery information
elements.description: The text 'Free delivery over $15' is smaller and placed below the main offer, providing additional details.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Shop now' in a clear, inviting font, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge displaying '30%' in a bold font, positioned at the bottom left, indicating a discount.

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: This element is a small text area at the bottom of the banner, likely for additional information.

elements.label: Extra information
elements.description: Another small text area that may provide further details or context, positioned near the bottom.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, 2-for-1 offer, free delivery
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main offer is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: CraveLoop, 2-for-l tonight Free delivery over $15, Shop now, 30%
